case_title: MBNA AMERICA BANK,N.A. VS. MOSES SIMMONS et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA BANK, N.A. MOTION IN SUPPORT OF PETITION TO COMFIRN ARBITRATION AWARD, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING -- GRANT - NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR # 2647

PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA BANK,N.A. AS TO RESPONDENT SIMMONS, MOSES DOES 1-5, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

ORDER GRANTING PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA BANK,N.A. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT SIMMONS, MOSES $5,014.80 PRINCIPAL, $1,073.03 INTEREST, $192.60 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,280.43, SEE SCANNED "JUDGMENT BY COURT"
